title: leontodon macrorrhizus
intro: Leontodon macrorrhizus, also known as Horse Dandelion or Long-rooted Leontodon, is a plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and triterpenoid saponins. The health benefits of Leontodon macrorrhizus include its ability to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation and pain, and even lower blood pressure. Leontodon macrorrhizus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
